blockers: excluded complete members with non-pinned d02 grid shape: 20260509_18z_l3_24h_20260511T190519Z has d02 shape (66, 120), expected pinned (66, 159)

heldout_policy.reason: M6-S2 pinned GPU forecast day is excluded from the tolerance sample.

method.candidate_peek_policy: tolerances are written before held-out candidate validation
method.diagnostic_only_reason: Local Gen2 wrf_l3 history has fewer than 10 complete d02 day-members through +24h; the table is a pre-candidate diagnostic computed from the complete members only.
method.k_rationale: 1.96 approximates a two-sided 95% normal interval for this M6 prototype.
method.precip_definition: (RAINC + RAINNC + optional RAINSH at lead) - same components at lead 0
method.sample_type: 3 complete deterministic historical Gen2 wrf_l3 day-members; 10 required for acceptance
method.stratum_reduction: RMS of per-grid-cell member standard deviation; tolerance = k * sigma_rms_member_std
method.variance_estimator: per-grid-cell sample variance across members with ddof=1

prototype_label: M6 prototype; full ensemble at M7
